zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine de Cressey於大約1357年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾霍德索可時，她的父親Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock20歲，母親Agnes De Swan17歲。她於1378年與Sir John Clifton在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾布萊斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1419年在英國諾廷加姆爾布萊斯享年63歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾布萊斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine de Cressey于大约1357年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾霍德索可时，她的父亲Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock20岁，母亲Agnes De Swan17岁。她于1378年与Sir John Clifton在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾布萊斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1419年在英国諾廷加姆爾布萊斯享年63岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾布萊斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cressey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Creasey  .
Probably also an altered form of German   Kresse   or   Kresser  .

variants.name: Creasey
meanings: English (Lincolnshire, or Norman origin): habitational name from Cressy in Seine-Maritime, France (see   Cressy  ).
Possibly an Americanized form of any of the German names mentioned at   Creasy  .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine de Cressey was born about 1357, in Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock, was 20 and her mother, Agnes De Swan, was 17. She married Sir John Clifton in 1378, in Blyth, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1419, in Blyth, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Blyth, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine de Cressey est née environ 1357, à Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Agnes De Swan, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Clifton en 1378, à Blyth, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1419, à Blyth, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Blyth, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine de Cressey um 1357 in Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock 20 und ihre Mutter Agnes De Swan 17. Sie hat 1378 in Blyth, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Clifton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1419 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Blyth, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Blyth, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Cressey è nata il circa 1357 nel Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Agnes De Swan, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Clifton nel 1378, nel Blyth, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1419, nel Blyth, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Blyth, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de Cresseyが約1357年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホードソックで生まれた時，父Sir John de Cressy of Hodsockは20歳，母Agnes De Swanは17歳であった。1378年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアブリスでSir John Cliftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1419年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアブリスで63歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアブリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Cressey(이)가 대략 1357년 영국 노틴그함실르 호드속에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes De Swan(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 블리스에서 Sir John Clifton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 노틴그함실르 블리스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 블리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Cressey nasceu aproximadamente 1357, em Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Agnes De Swan, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Clifton em 1378, em Blyth, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1419, em Blyth, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Blyth, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine de Cressey родилась около 1357 г. в местности ходсокк, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes De Swan, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Clifton в 1378 г. в местности блит, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1419 г. в местности блит, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности блит, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine de Cressey nació aproximadamente 1357, en Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Agnes De Swan, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Sir John Clifton en 1378, en Blyth, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1419, en Blyth, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Blyth, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
